121212121111212.content:
Emma didn't agree because she hadn't had another accident in the three days. Lou found Emma alone in the cabin.

Lou: "Hey Emma we need to talk."

Emma: "Yeah about what?"

Lou: "Your wetting the other day."

Emma blushed and then Lou brought out the diapers.

Emma: "What are those?!"

Lou: "Diapers. Camp rules state that bedwetters have to wear diapers. Normally kids in our camp don't wet the bed so I had to order some in your size and they just arrived."

Emma: "Come on Lou! It was a one time thing! I don't need diapers! I'm not a baby!"

What happens next?

12531111212.content:
The campers arrived on their first day at Camp Kikiwaka and dropped all of their stuff off in the bunks and then went outside to socialize with the other campers for the first time.

Destiny dropped her backpack on her bunk quickly and rushed outside to hang out with the other kids. As the kids were outside catching up, Emma used the opportunity to organize the kids stuff a bit for them in the bunk. While she was tidying up Destiny's area, she moved the backpack and noted that it was cracked open a bit. Nosily, she looked inside the backpack and saw four Pampers diapers that looked like:

https://www.adisc.org/forum/data/attachm...

"Hah, she's 12 year old what is she doing with baby diapers?" Emma asked.

What did Emma do next?

some time ago Jessie was given an offer to be adopted by the Ross's to which Jessie agreed feeling like she had become like a member of the family in her few years as the Ross kid's nanny. Christina, after sighing the adoption papers, the family made arrangements for Jessie to be the baby of the family as a fresh start with her new family.
